narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp H (precinct in Warren County) has 906 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points.
